title: PixelXYU Result
description: Returns the PixelX, PixelY and Angle position coordinates of the found part's position in the image coordinate system.
notes: The PixelXYU result returns coordinates in the image coordinate system.
see_also:
Applies To

Vision Objects: ArcFinder, ArcInspector, BoxFinder, Blob, CornerFinder, Correlation, DefectFinder, Edge, Geometric, Point, Polar, LineInspector, Coordinates

Angle Result	RobotXYU Result

CameraXYU Result	RobotU Result

CameraX Result	RobotX Result

CameraY Result	RobotY Result
